ddls:
CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the frame belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used to process the frame */,
  "score_overall" REAL /* Overall confidence score for the frame */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number in the video */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Time taken to process the frame */,
  "frame_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the frame within the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "video_name" TEXT /* Name of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "frame_rate" REAL /* Frame rate of the video */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the video in bytes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the video content */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_points" (
  "key_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key point */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame the key point belongs to */,
  "key_point_type" INTEGER /* ID of the key point type */,
  "score" REAL /* Confidence score for the key point */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the key point */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the key point */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the key point */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the key point (0: not visible, 1: visible) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the key point was detected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_points_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_points_key_point_type FOREIGN KEY ("key_point_type") REFERENCES key_point_types ("key_point_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_point_types" (
  "key_point_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key point type */,
  "key_point_type" TEXT /* Name of the key point type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_point_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "model_path" TEXT /* Path to the model file */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data used for the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performances" (
  "model_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the video */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model on the video */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model on the video */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Average processing time per frame for the model on the video */,
  "fps" REAL /* Frames per second processed by the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performances_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performances_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the video */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the video */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the video */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_updates" (
  "model_update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model update */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model after the update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who performed the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., bug fix, feature addition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
